LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO APRIL-24-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF S. A.'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE DOE AMENDMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF PLAINTIFF S.A. FOR LEAVE TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE SOJOURNER TRUTH FOSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY AS DOE DEFENDANT 1 AND ALTERNATIVE FAMILY SERVICES, INC. AS DOE DEFENDANT 2 IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING ALONG WITH THE TWO DOE AMENDMENTS. FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO -- DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/6/23 IS CONTINUED TO 8/26/24 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES, INCLUDING DISCOVERY, MOTION CUT-OFF AND EXPERT DATES, SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED. ALSO, THE PARTIES MUST EMAIL DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN 6 WEEKS BEFORE THE NEW TRIAL DATE FOR A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH A DATE AMENABLE FOR ALL PARTIES. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendant's motion to strike is granted without leave to amend. Treble damages pursuant to CCP sec. 340.1(b) are punitive in nature. Such damages are therefore not recoverable against a public entity such as defendant per Gov't sec. 818. (See Los Angeles Unified School Dist. v. Superior Court (2021) 64 Cal.App.5th 549 (review granted Sept. 1, 2021, No. S269608, 282 Cal.Rptr.3d 638.) Plaintiff may seek leave to amend to re-assert the claim for treble damages if the Supreme Court reverses the Los Angeles Unified School Dist. v. Superior Court decision.

Order is signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)
